main_hook: Transform your product launch with AI-powered video campaigns
voiceover_script: Voiceover style: professional and engaging. Show how KadriX helps teams create compelling video ads in minutes, not days.
video_concept: A 60-second demo showing the KadriX platform workflow from campaign creation to video preview generation.

storyboard_scenes.visual_direction: Show frustrated marketer looking at complex video editing software
storyboard_scenes.narration: Creating video ads shouldn't take weeks of production time

storyboard_scenes.visual_direction: Clean dashboard interface with campaign creation form
storyboard_scenes.narration: KadriX uses AI to generate complete video campaign blueprints instantly

storyboard_scenes.visual_direction: Show the campaign blueprint with storyboard scenes appearing
storyboard_scenes.narration: Get a full storyboard, voiceover script, and visual direction in seconds

storyboard_scenes.visual_direction: Click 'Generate Preview' button and watch video render
storyboard_scenes.narration: Generate a preview video to visualize your campaign before production

storyboard_scenes.visual_direction: Show feedback loop and campaign refinement
storyboard_scenes.narration: Refine your campaign with AI-powered feedback and regenerate instantly

storyboard_scenes.visual_direction: Final polished campaign ready for production
storyboard_scenes.narration: Go from idea to production-ready campaign in minutes

mood_direction: Professional, modern, and efficient with a focus on speed and quality
music_direction: Upbeat corporate background music with steady tempo
visual_style: Clean, modern UI with smooth transitions and clear typography
call_to_action: Start creating AI-powered video campaigns today at kadrix.ai
